metadata.description: Checks and balances triggered when cash runway EXCEEDS industry benchmark
metadata.focus: Capital efficiency, growth investment, debt optimization, and preventing waste

universal_growth_controls.title: Idle Cash Sweep Policy
universal_growth_controls.description: Maintain only 30 days of operating expenses in checking. Automatically sweep excess into high-yield savings or money market funds weekly.
universal_growth_controls.impact: Maximizes yield on excess cash without risking spendable cash

universal_growth_controls.title: High-Interest Debt Retirement
universal_growth_controls.description: Identify any debt with interest rates >8%. Create a payoff schedule using excess cash. Prioritize variable-rate debt first.
universal_growth_controls.impact: Guaranteed risk-free return equal to the interest rate saved

universal_growth_controls.title: Vendor Early-Payment Negotiation
universal_growth_controls.description: Leverage excess cash to negotiate 2% discount if paid within 10 days Net 30 terms with top 5 vendors. Implement a system to automatically capture these discounts.
universal_growth_controls.impact: Immediate reduction in cost of sales/OpEx

universal_growth_controls.title: Formal Capital Allocation Policy
universal_growth_controls.description: Establish written thresholds for spending (e.g., any expense >$5k requires Return on Investment (ROI) calculation  more than 15%). Prevents 'cash burn' just because funds are available.
universal_growth_controls.impact: Prevents 'Lifestyle Creep' and low-Return on Investment (ROI) waste

controls.title: Preventive Maintenance Overhaul
controls.description: Use excess cash to fully fund the maintenance backlog on critical machinery. Reduces unplanned downtime risk.

controls.title: Automation CapEx Reserve
controls.description: Establish a dedicated sinking fund for the next equipment upgrade cycle. Prevents financing needs when the machine eventually breaks.

controls.title: Inventory Expansion Strategy
controls.description: Analyze stockout data. Use excess cash to deepen inventory levels on high-turnover, high-price SKUs.

controls.title: Store Renovation Reserve
controls.description: Accumulate funds for a planned 'refresh' of the store layout or signage to match current brand standards.

controls.title: Intellectual Property Development
controls.description: Allocate budget to productize services (create templates, courses, or Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) tools) to generate passive revenue.
controls.impact: Diversifies revenue stream beyond billable hours

controls.title: Key Person Insurance Funding
controls.description: Use excess cash to fund Buy-Sell agreements or Key Person life insurance policies.

controls.title: Bonding Capacity Improvement
controls.description: Strengthen balance sheet with excess cash to qualify for higher bonding limits, enabling bidding on larger public projects.
controls.impact: Access to larger, higher priced contracts

controls.title: Staff Retention Program
controls.description: Implement a bonus pool or certification reimbursement program to reduce turnover costs.
